name: 暗影双匕（★） | 多普勒
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated. Getting lost in its color can prove fatal
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了糖衣。 被其外表所迷惑后果会很严重
